description_long: This sculpture is a vertically oriented, intricately carved relief featuring multiple human figures in dynamic poses, adorned with elaborate garments and headdresses. The figures appear to be standing on a decorative base, possibly with animal motifs, and are surrounded by ornate, flowing elements that suggest a narrative or mythological scene. The surface is highly textured, with deep undercuts and detailed facial expressions, giving the piece a sense of depth and movement. The material appears to be a single block of stone or wood, with a weathered, matte finish and some visible chipping along the edges. The coloration is predominantly a warm, earthy tone, with subtle variations due to lighting and surface wear. The overall form is irregular, with a jagged top and uneven sides, indicating it may be a fragment of a larger work.
description: A detailed, vertically carved relief sculpture depicting multiple human figures in ornate attire, set against a textured, decorative background. The piece is made from a single block of stone or wood and features intricate surface details and a weathered, earthy appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the relief and the jagged, irregular edge, with some figures partially visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main figures, their detailed attire, and expressive poses, as well as the decorative base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the thickness of the sculpture and the continuation of carved elements along the edge.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the three-dimensionality of the figures and the intricate surface textures.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological or historical human figures in relief
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and neutral.
